column1: #mapping_set_description: Assay_fields-level mappings from ncihtan/data-models@v25.2.1 to ncihtan/htan2-data-model@v1.3.0

column8: WES Level 1 file format from base.

data_models:Imaging Level 3 Channels/Oligo Barcode Upper Strand

column8: Primary: Protocol Link → IMAGING_PROTOCOL is a direct name+concept match (exactMatch 0.9).
Primary (closeMatch 0.9): SPATIAL_ASSAY_TYPE in SpatialLevel3 is the closest concept match for "Spatial Assay Type"; class changed from base to level-specific.
Parent ID field; HTAN2 is broader (biospecimen or data file parent).
HTAN1 Comment captures QC notes; HTAN2 has dedicated QC comment.
Primary secondary: Imaging Assay Type overlaps with EXPERIMENTAL_STRATEGY_AND_DATA_SUBTYPES as 1-to-many split primary; HTAN2 field is broader (strategy + subtypes).
UMI tag; cross-class from Sequencing base.
HTAN2 QC-specific; HTAN1 generic workflow link.
HTAN2 QC-specific; HTAN1 generic workflow type.
HTAN2 QC-specific; HTAN1 generic workflow version.
Gene panel indicates targeted vs whole transcriptome.
Secondary (closeMatch 0.65): QC_FEATURE_NUMBER is broader than Number of Genes — "features" can include genes, proteins, etc. QC_TOTAL_GENES_DETECTED is the primary exactMatch.
Secondary (closeMatch 0.65): PLATFORM in SpatialLevel1 partially captures spatial assay type but is broader (platform ≈ instrument/technology). Primary is SPATIAL_ASSAY_TYPE.
Secondary (closeMatch 0.65): PLATFORM in SpatialLevel3 captures the spatial platform; secondary to SPATIAL_ASSAY_TYPE which is the primary name match.
Secondary split: Imaging Assay Type partially maps to IMAGE_MODALITY; modality is a subset aspect of assay type (broadMatch, lower confidence).
Microscope field includes manufacturer; HTAN2 splits it out.
Microscope field includes model; HTAN2 splits it out.
HTAN1 summary statistic narrower than extraction method.
Antibody name is part of staining but not the method.
Secondary: Protocol Link may reference a DOI but CITATION_OR_DOI is a different concept; relatedMatch at 0.5.
Workflow type partially captures RNA measurement.
Secondary (relatedMatch 0.4): "Software and Version" may include de-identification software but IMAGING_SOFTWARE is the primary match; DE_IDENTIFICATION_SOFTWARE is a related but distinct field.
Secondary (relatedMatch 0.4): SEGMENTATION_WORKFLOW_VERSION captures a version string that may appear in "Software and Version" but the fields differ in scope and class context.
Secondary (relatedMatch 0.4): FEATURE_EXTRACTION_WORKFLOW_VERSION captures a version string that may appear in "Software and Version" but the fields differ in scope and class context.
